name: SecurityLocalRegisterApplicationProtocol
title: SecurityLocalRegisterApplicationProtocol
description: Registers the reception of the application protocol with the specified User Defined Id. The node will receive this application protocol as soon as it is transmitted on the network and the callbacks OnSecurityLocalApplicationProtocolRxFinished or OnSecurityLocalApplicationProtocolTxFinished will also be called accordingly.
The call of SecurityLocalAllowNetworkWideRegistrations is a precondition for using this function.

parameters.name: char applicationProtocolUserDefinedId[]
parameters.description: Name of the Application Protocol to register for (form 1 and form 2).

parameters.name: dword vLanId
parameters.description: In case of Ethernet networks, the VLAN has to be specified as well.

return: Name of the Application Protocol to register
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
